objective: QuickTeam staffing-seller: a US practice hiring a JUNIOR, remote-capable admin role we can fill with an offshore VA is the CUSTOMER. Re-oriented from the old job-seeker rubric using 61 real human corrections (20/61 = 33% of leads the old AI wrongly discarded, almost all because it treated 'US work authorization required' as a disqualifier).

hard_disqualifiers.clinical duties: take vitals|room(ing)? patients|phlebotomy|draw blood|administer injection|\bEKG\b|specimen collection|assist (the )?provider with exams|back office clinical

hospital_pattern: hospital|health system|health services\b|medical center\b|\bVA\b|Kaiser|HCA|Ascension|CommonSpirit|Providence|Banner Health|Cleveland Clinic|Mayo Clinic|UPMC|Mount Sinai|Cedars|Mass General|Brigham|University of|Mercy(health| Health)?\b|Fairview|Intermountain|Sutter|Geisinger|Sanford Health|Corewell|Northwell|AdventHealth|Baylor Scott|Trinity Health|Bon Secours|Scripps|Sharp Health|Legacy Health|Community Health Systems
big_org_pattern: VillageMD|US Acute Care|AssistRx|Shields Health|Optum|Athenahealth|R1 RCM|Ensemble Health|Conifer|Change Healthcare|Envision|TeamHealth|UnitedHealth|Pfizer|\bCVS\b|Walgreens|Humana|Aetna|Cigna|Centene|Elevance|McKesson|Cardinal Health|Quest Diagnostics|Labcorp|Merck|Novartis|Philips
_removed_red_flag: OLD rubric penalized 'must be authorized to work in the US | W-2 only | no 1099' by -25. REMOVED — for a staffing seller these are normal US employers and are the target customers. This single change recovers most of the 20 wrongly-discarded leads. It is now an outreach flag, not a penalty.
us_cert_pattern: \bCPC\b|\bCCS\b|\bCPB\b|\bRHIA\b|\bRHIT\b|certified professional coder|AAPC|AHIMA|required EPIC|EPIC certified|medical coder|coding specialist|medical coding

title_clusters.front_desk: receptionist|front desk|front office|patient service|patient access|scheduler|scheduling|patient coordinator|patient care coordinator|intake
title_clusters.records_dataentry: medical records|health information|data entry|\bROI\b|records clerk|administrative assistant|office assistant|bookkeeping

outreach_flags.needs_convincing_abroad: must be authorized to work in the (US|United States)|W-?2 only|no (contractors|1099)|US citizen|located in the (US|United States)|US-based

notes: Scoring order: hard disqualifiers -> clinical title -> hospital/big-org -> senior title (strong penalty + cap 40) -> start 50, apply red flags, green flags -> us-cert deprioritize -> intermediary cap -> weak-medical cap -> ambiguous-remote cap 69 -> verdict by gate. Outreach flags do NOT affect score; they drive sequence angle (hourly cost-comparison, 'convince to hire abroad', low-salary handling).
